ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jun-29-2022 Continued To Sep-21-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Louis Lau appeared by zoom for petitioner.

The court stated that is does not have an inventory and appraisal ("I & A"), and that it needs either a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status of administration. Mr. Lau stated that he was informed that his client passed away six months ago, that he needs to find a new administrator amongst the children of the decedent and that they have seven children. Mr. Lau also stated that Victor's family came across a tragedy, that one son in Vietnam passed away, that the other children are quite distressed, that it has been hard for the children to get back to him and that most of the children do not want to be the administrator. In addition, Mr. Lau requested a continuance so that he can try to persuade one of the children to become the administrator, stated that two are in Vietnam, that five are in the States and that the eldest child is responding. The court raised the issue of the children nominating someone to serve. Status on close of estate is continued to September 21, 2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Status on filing of a final inventory and appraisal, and status on filing of a petition to appoint a successor administrator are also set for September 21, 2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Mr. Lau is to file a petition for approval of report on status of administration telling and updating what he said today, and the I & A by September 12, 2022. Mr. Lau stated that he thinks he can file a partial inventory and appraisal.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: H. Singh. Not reported.
